title: Bern, Bern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Bern is a city in Bern with a population of 134,000. Switzerland’s capital city, a UNESCO World Heritage site with a beautifully preserved medieval old town, the Zytglogge clock tower, and the Bear Park.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
